effects.effect: Play this card as a Vivosaur into one of your Vivosaur zones (150LP/Neutral/MID/[Machine]) with this ability:

effects.name: Automatic Cleaning Machine!
effects.effect: Neither player can apply statuses to this Vivosaur. Neither player gets a KO Point if this Vivosaur is defeated. You can rest this Vivosaur and Pay 1 FP; discard the top card of your Opponent's Deck and draw 1 card.
